Raw MLP student distillation from frozen PLS failed retrieval consistency across seeds.
Exact trainable linear clone of frozen PLS passed Tier 2 as an engineering baseline.
Zero-initialized residual adapter stayed safe but did not improve over the PLS clone.
Generative counterfactual decoder preserved retrieval but failed counterfactual gates.
Residual RNA delta decoder improved per-gene counterfactual metrics but failed program consistency across seeds.
Synthetic program-delta loss did not fix program recovery consistency.
Program-factorized decoder preserved protected geometry and seed0 gate but failed seeds1/2 program recovery.
Delta-MSE loss reproduced the seed0 program-factorized pass but was not advanced after broader program-factorized failures.
Source program context improved seed0 program recovery but failed seeds1/2 full gate.
Direct no-batch biological metadata plus source program context passed seed0 but failed seeds1/2 full counterfactual gate; no promotion.

Sparse perturbation-only residual delta head with program/top-DE weighted loss, outside-program sparsity, z_inv/z_pert decorrelation, and matching-mean baseline; protected geometry preserved but logFC/top50 failed and matching mean was stronger.

Amplitude-focused sparse perturbation residual variant with rank-8 dictionary and higher global/top-DE pressure; protected geometry preserved and logFC improved but top50/program/logFC all underperformed matching mean.

Formal no-batch matched perturbed-mean baseline using perturbation_id/cell_line_id/dose/time and excluding batch_id; exact key coverage 1.0000, program 0.7520, top50 0.5683, direction 0.6899, pseudobulk 0.8725.
Residualized matching baseline x_cf=x_control+mean_delta[perturbation_id/cell_line_id/dose/time], batch_id excluded; reproduces matching-mean reference with program 0.3502 and top50 0.4150.
kNN residual transport in no-batch source program space with k=1; program 0.5146 but logFC 0.0513 and top50 0.4075 failed the matching reference.
kNN residual transport in no-batch source program space with k=3; best transport top50 0.4308 and program 0.5293 but logFC 0.0623 stayed below residualized matching.
kNN residual transport in no-batch source program space with k=5; program 0.5145 and top50 0.4217 did not offset logFC regression to -0.0038.
kNN residual transport in no-batch source program space with k=8; smoothing moved delta ratio near ridge scale but still missed residualized matching logFC/top50/program jointly.
In-repo entropic Sinkhorn residual transport in no-batch source program space; exact support 12 cells per condition, program 0.4211, top50 0.4217, logFC 0.0657, so no neural transport follow-up.

Leakage-safe train-only condition mean table using perturbation_id/cell_line_id/dose/time only; exact train-key coverage 1.0000 and metrics match Experiment 213: program 0.7520, logFC 0.7502, top50 0.5683, direction 0.6899, pseudobulk 0.8725.

Closed-form linear conditional mean student with no-batch biological key/source-program features; train-only teacher MSE 6.56e-14, leakage gate passed, but seed-2 test stayed below train-only teacher: program 0.7353, logFC 0.7261, top50 0.5583.

Small regularized MLP conditional mean student trained only on train-split teacher targets; leakage gate passed but underfit the train-only teacher on seed-2 test: program 0.7033, logFC 0.7286, top50 0.5525.

Best nonzero shrinkage hybrid by program/logFC ordering: alpha=0.1 linear student plus train-only table fallback; leakage gate passed and program 0.7526 slightly exceeded table, but logFC/top50/pseudobulk did not beat the exact train-only teacher jointly.

Family O synthetic-only count-likelihood candidate; stage A, Poisson NLL 513.3838, NB NLL NA, program -0.0393, logFC 0.1191, top50 0.2925, direction 0.4052, pseudobulk 0.7549; batch_id excluded and raw-count path audited.
